new_terms.context: The cableless design reduces the compute tray assembly time from 2 hours to 5 minutes.
The modules connecting to each via board-to-board connectors.
The Strata module of VR NVL72 is the equivalent of the Bianca board of GB200/300.
The Orchid Module houses two ConnectX-9 NICs, two 800G transceiver cages, and one E1.S module slot.
The midplane acts as a bridge for the PCIe signal between the two Strata modules.
Replaced by Paladin HD2 board-to-board connectors at the bottom of the module.
The Strata module is the equivalent of the Bianca board of GB200/300.
BlueField-4 acts as a DPU providing up to 800Gb/s of front end networking capability.

new_terms.suggested_translation: 推理上下文存储内存 / CMX
new_terms.context: Inference Context Memory Storage, a platform for storing KV cache in LLM inference.
A purpose-built network architecture dedicated to KV cache traffic.

new_terms.suggested_translation: 数据中心安全控制模块
new_terms.context: Datacenter Secure Control Module, an OCP standard for management and security.
Data Processing Unit, used for offloading networking and storage tasks from the CPU.
A storage protocol used to access NVMe storage over a network fabric.
A metallic strip or bar used for high-current power distribution within the tray.
Nvidia's next-generation DPU acting as the controller for the context memory fabric.

new_terms.suggested_translation: Astra (高级安全可信资源架构)
new_terms.context: A system for unified management of front-end and back-end networks, offloading host CPU tasks.
A new component introduced to eliminate internal cables from the compute tray.
Modules at the front of the chassis used to connect signals from the midplane to front I/O ports.
Refers to front-end traffic entering or leaving the data center/cluster.
Refers to back-end high-speed traffic between servers within the cluster.
